title: Twin Counting Units: A Model-Free Test for Exact-Tie Anomalies in Election Returns, with Evidence from Two Korean Elections
description: Statistical analysis of 'twin' counting units (exact vote-count ties between distinct neighborhood-level units) in the 2026 Korean local elections and the 2025 presidential election. Includes a canonical multinomial-binomial generative model, a proof of the plug-in (parametric bootstrap) noise double-counting bias for exact ties, a model-free sideband (bump-hunt) estimator with lattice-shell normalization, a pre-specified cross-election replication test, full crawled data, analysis code, and the paper draft (Korean and English).
